_version_a_disclaimer: VERSION A — PROTOCOL DEMONSTRATION. The readings below are ILLUSTRATIVE STAND-IN numbers (from the worked example §5), NOT three real independent physical builds. This proves the ValiChord commit-reveal protocol carries hardware-shaped measurement data end-to-end to a HarmonyRecord; it does NOT prove medical correctness or regulatory approval. To produce Version B, replace the three entries in `readings` with real measured max-deviations — a single-file edit, no code change.

device.name: PEP Master — Organic Controller 3V Pressure Device
device.source: Breathing Games GitLab; DIY instructables — BG pressure device 2024; PEP Master R&D

test_protocol._firmware_commit_note: STAND-IN (Version A). Replace with the pinned git SHA of the exact built sketch for a real round.
test_protocol.sensor: differential_pressure (MPXV5010DP @5V / MP3V5010DP @3V / LPS35HW); 0-10 kPa; datasheet accuracy +/-5%

per_unit_calibration.zero: At atmospheric pressure (not blowing), reported value must read 0.
per_unit_calibration.span: Fit the firmware map() endpoints — scaledPressure = constrain(map(sensorValue,140,580,0,100),0,100) — so reported pressure matches the reference gauge across 0-20 cmH2O.
per_unit_calibration.reference_for_calibration: PariPEP pressure gauge (recommended) or water-column manometer. A 20-50 mL syringe is used only to GENERATE pressure, not as a volume standard.

reference_input.instrument: PariPEP pressure gauge (or calibrated water-column manometer)

test_protocol.procedure: At each setpoint, hold the generated pressure; record the device's reported cmH2O and the reference gauge's cmH2O simultaneously. Report max |device - reference| across setpoints.

tolerance._assumption: ASSUMPTION (Version A): +/-5% of-reading; confirm with Breathing Games (of-reading vs of-full-scale changes the pass band at low pressures).

test_protocol.outcome_rule: Reproduced if every setpoint within +/-5% of the reference; PartiallyReproduced if every setpoint within +/-10% but some outside +/-5%; FailedToReproduce otherwise; UnableToAssess if build/test could not be completed (state why).

readings.name: Builder A
readings._note: STAND-IN (worked example §5). Swap for a real measured max-deviation across setpoints 5/10/15/20 for Version B.
